skill.epicfight_dd.piercing_fang.tooltip: A Skill used by the Bloody Finger hunter Yura. (Milady only) Press Z for Wingstance.
skill.epicfight_dd.gentle_nudge.tooltip: Legends say that the name of this skill was invented by a being who had the power to change the laws of the world.
skill.epicfight_dd.skull_rupture.tooltip: This skill is only intended for particularly strong arms. Difficult for you.
skill.epicfight_dd.quick_rush.tooltip: Skill prized by the crafty and fleet of foot. Can be used to hurt Grass.
skill.epicfight_dd.impailing_thrust.tool: A skill that lets piercing armaments overcome enemy shields. Build power, then lunge forward for a long thrust that pierces an enemy's guard.
skill.epicfight_dd.whirlwind.tooltip: An extremely realistic skill that destroys everything in its path.
skill.epicfight_dd.spinning_shadow.toolt: This skill pierces part of the armour and knocks enemies down.
skill.epicfight_dd.evil_beam.tooltip: Unleash a beam of demonic energy on your attackers!
